title: calophyllum dioscurii
intro: Calophyllum dioscurii, also known as the Philippine Calophyllum, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum dioscurii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting potential antimalarial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve extracting its active compounds through methods such as decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
